title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXXI. Songs.
content:
Polly put the kettle on,
        Polly put the kettle on,
        Polly put the kettle on,
            And let's drink tea.

        Sukey take it off again,
        Sukey take it off again,
        Sukey take it off again,
            They're all gone away.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXXXI. Songs." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
